tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Zinedine Zidane is one of the greatest midfielders in football history and a legend of French football.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He led France to victory in the 1998 FIFA World Cup and UEFA Euro 2000.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Zidane later became a successful manager and won multiple Champions League titles with Real Madrid.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Kylian Mbappé is one of the fastest and most talented players in modern football.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the FIFA World Cup with France in 2018 at just 19 years old.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Mbappé became one of the youngest players to score in a World Cup final.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Thierry Henry is considered one of the greatest strikers in football history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the 1998 FIFA World Cup and UEFA Euro 2000 with France.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Henry became Arsenal's all time top scorer.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Michel Platini was one of the most creative midfielders in football history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He led France to victory in the UEFA Euro 1984.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Platini won the Ballon d'Or three consecutive times.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Antoine Griezmann is a key attacking player for the French national team.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He played a major role in France winning the 2018 FIFA World Cup.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Griezmann has played for clubs like Atlético Madrid and Barcelona.
